name: io.github.xmpuspus/ph-civic-data-mcp
title: PH Civic Data
description: Philippine civic data (PHIVOLCS, PAGASA, PhilGEPS, PSA) + NASA POWER solar/climate + Open-Meteo air quality + MODIS NDVI + USGS earthquakes + NOAA IBTrACS historical typhoons + World Bank indicators. 17 MCP tools, no auth required.

environmentVariables.name: PAGASA_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional PAGASA TenDay API token. Without it, get_weather_forecast automatically falls back to Open-Meteo.
